info.text: Ever lasting theories are built on solid ground.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Bad theories are built on shifting sand.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: His theory was built on shaky ground.

info.text: His theory was built on shaky ground.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: His theory collapsed under the weight of evidence.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: His theory collapsed under the gravity of evidence.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: His theory was very weak, and it collapsed under pressure.

info.text: His theory was very weak, and it collapsed under pressure.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Well researched theories will let you stand tall.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The destructive winds of knowledge ripped apart his flimsy theory.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Scientific theories should be able to withstand all destructive forces.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We need to sturdy up our argument with some more evidence.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Logical theories let you rise above others.

info.text: Well established theories allow us to rise into the clouds.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I think we should add another wing to the theory.

info.text: His scientific theory was made of steel.
